stimulus: In discussing tides, oceanographers sometimes mention the role of king tides. What are king tides, and why ______ Part of the regular tidal cycle, king tides are unusually high tides that occur when the Sun, Moon, and Earth align. In low-lying coastal cities, these tides can flood streets and disrupt daily life.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The sentence consists of two coordinated direct questions; both require interrogative word order and a question mark.

Choice A uses interrogative word order but ends with a period. Choice C uses declarative word order but ends with a question mark. Choice D is declarative throughout and ends with a period.
